name: signingCreateAccount
title: Create Account via Signing Service
description:
Creates a new Ed25519 key in the signing service and a corresponding on-chain Convex account. Optionally funds the account via faucet. The private key is stored encrypted server-side.

Requires authentication via bearer token and a peer with faucet enabled.

passphrase.description: Passphrase to encrypt the new signing key

faucet.description: Optional amount of Convex coins to request from faucet (in copper). Max 1 CVX.

address.description: Address of the newly created account

publicKey.description: Hex-encoded public key of the created signing key
